verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lovely are Your dwelling places, Thirsty I come after You. Jesus, my joy, my reward, Your love's restoring my soul Now I'm Yours and You are mine, And from my heart a song will rise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love You, I love You, I love You! I love You, I love You, I love You! I love You, I love You, I love You! And my heart will follow wholly after You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, there is none beside You, Righteous Ruler of the earth. Nations will come and bow down, Name of all names, I'll sing new praises, And all that I can sing to You.
